title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: The Workflow to Build BEAUTIFUL Frontends
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a workflow that routes different phases of frontend development to specialized models: Claude Opus for reasoning and planning, Gemini 3.5 Flash for UI design. The approach leverages each model's strengths while using handoff documents to coordinate between phases, supported by tools like Pi and Archon to automate the chain.
